title: It's Only Life After All
original_title: Indigo Girls: It's Only Life After All
overview: An intimate look into the lives of one of the most iconic folk-rock bands in America - the Indigo Girls. With never-before-seen archival and intimate vérité the film dives into the songwriting and storytelling of the music that transformed a generation.
